Build the three apps using the files @.github\prompts\create-fitness-studio-api.prompt.md @.github\prompts\create-library-api.prompt.md and @.github\prompts\create-vet-clinic-api.prompt.md make sure to use the skills that are available. 

I want you to ouput what skills you are using during the code generation. When you are done building the apps, I want you to crete a file in ./src named "gen-notes.md" which includes details of the Skills that were used during the generation of these apps.

When building these apps I want you to run them in a seperate context and isolated from each other. I don't want any knowledge shared between the agents creating these apps.
